problem:
Each person marked the table with an X on the day(s) he/she would not be able to attend a meeting. On which day can the most people attend a meeting?

\begin{tabular}{|l|c|c|c|c|c|}
\multicolumn{6}{c}{}\\\hline
&Mon&Tues&Wed&Thurs&Fri\\\hline
Anna&X&&X&&\\\hline
Bill&&X&&X&X\\\hline
Carl&X&X&&X&X\\\hline
\end{tabular}

classified_questions.question: What is the purpose of marking the table with X for each person?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: How many people are able to attend the meeting each day?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Which day has the least number of people able to attend the meeting?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: On which day can the highest number of people attend the meeting?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How do you determine the day with the most attendees based on the table provided?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Can the scheduling be rearranged to accommodate more attendees on certain days? If so, how?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: If one more person is added to the table on Monday with an X mark, will it affect the day with the most attendees? Why or why not?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: How would you prioritize which day to schedule the meeting based on the table provided?
classified_questions.label: b
